/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -std=c++11 -O3 -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libgtest.so -o libgtest.so CMakeFiles/gtest.dir/src/gtest-all.cc.o   -L/home/RZS/A06_ws/build_isolated/lidar_cluster/gtest/googlemock/gtest/src  -Wl,-rpath,/home/RZS/A06_ws/build_isolated/lidar_cluster/gtest/googlemock/gtest/src -lpthread
